commands_run:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request
with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:19186/api/spec-registry/source-list') as r:
    body = json.loads(r.read())
    print(r.status, r.headers.get('X-Form-Router'), len(body), body[0]['spec_id'], body[-1]['spec_id'], body[-1]['content_path'])
PY
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_specs_source_native_route.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py
failure_reason: Freed the source-backed spec registry list from forced Python handling by adding /api/spec-registry/source-list to the production kernel-router manifest. The route reads specs/INDEX.md in Form, parses 146 source spec rows after this contract joined the index, and emits SpecRegistryEntry-shaped JSON with X-Form-Router:native-kernel. Mutable spec registry DB behavior remains FastAPI until a live storage carrier and native frontmatter parser land.
